creator: alexbestms@wwu.de
text:
still an issue.

using the link http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?prp=116460-2-shar
works!

however when one looks at
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/116460 and goes click
shar-3.sh the problem is still there. for some reason clicking the attachment
directs one to:

http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?prp=116460-3-shar&n=/shar-3.sh

could anybody shed some light on this and maybe fix it?

cheers.
alex
